ratings.name: prof.dr.ir. B.J. Geurts
ratings.review:
As Han's supervisor of his Bachelor thesis, I have had the opportunity to observe Han’s academic merit, professional attitude, and immense interest in the subject of neuromorphic computing.

Han's bachelor thesis, which I supervise, exposed him to the deep concept of neuromorphic computing. Han has set out to explore the complexities of neuromorphic systems through the development of software that leverages Monte Carlo simulations. Han has proposed incorporating empirical data sets into the simulation process to improve the accuracy and relevance of the outcomes. This could bring insightful information that I am excited to see. This initiative reflects Han's dedication to pushing the boundaries of his understanding and his proactive stance in seeking ways to enhance the quality and applicability of his work.

It is my belief that the field of neuromorphic computing is interdisciplinary at its core and stands to gain immensely from students like Han who not only bring a depth of understanding in both mathematics and computer science but also embody the collaborative and innovative spirit necessary for breakthroughs in this area. As a student pursuing both degrees, he can bring essential capabilities to this field.

ratings.name: Lilian Spijker
ratings.origin: Study adviser Applied Mathematics at University of Twente
ratings.review:
Han has shown a good academic performance within our programme until now. He has shown that he can adapt quickly to a new educational environment and is a student who works very independently, has strong organisational skills, is sociable and someone who likes to challenge himself. In order to get a double degree, it is not enough to have good secondary school marks in mathematics and some knowledge of programming. Motivation, ambition and a certain degree of independence is expected from these double degree students.

Despite already taking more EC than the average student, Han is also actively involved in the programme. For example, he is a member of a committee doing evaluations within the computer Science progamme, he joined our Al team and he has been appointed as a teaching assistant. And besides this amount of duties and responsibilities, he also runs his own teaching business. This shows that he is ambitious and can keep many tasks in motion at the same time.

ratings.name: Vojtěch Ešner
ratings.review: Han is a super addition to the FE team here at Digitoo. He is very keen on picking up new technologies and fears no challenge. He was able to very quickly understand the main points of the business and he also had bright ideas how we can push the user experience even further.

ratings.name: Michal Honc
ratings.review: Rapid thinker, quick to understand the task, passionate, and excels in problem-solving

ratings.name: Kryštof Mitka
ratings.review: S Ha jsem měl možnost spolupracovat na řadě nejrůznějších projektů v rámci školy University of Twente. Společně se nám podařilo všechny projekty obhájit a vždy jsme dosáhli výborného výsledku. Zároveň jsme společně vyhráli programovací soutěž TAPC a postupem jsme se zúčastnili mezinárodní programovací soutěže BAPC. Ha je výborný v bedlivém naslouchání, které doplňuje rychlým porozuměním problémům a vysokým pracovním nasazením. Jeho specialitou je kreativní řešení problémů a nesmírně rychlá adaptace na prostředí. Určitě bych se s ním v budoucnu rád podílel na dalších společných projektech.

ratings.name: Ngoc Minh Nguyen
ratings.review:
Throughout our collaboration on the project "360 Degree View of Life". Han's contributions were precious. Han's the one who founded the project and organized it well with his unique perspectives, which was a key to its success. Throughout this collaboration, Han demonstrated management skills, effectively communicated, provided constructive feedback, and appreciated team members' ideas, fostering a productive and positive working environment. Han skillfully united the team around a shared vision while respecting and integrating diverse perspectives, playing a crucial role in shaping our cohesive and impactful project.

Han is the most talented and hard-working person, and the friendliest friend that I ever met. Han's huge positive energy, creativity, intellectual depth, and interpersonal skills enriched the project, as well as our friendship and his relationships in life. It was a pleasure to meet and work with Han, an extraordinary individual.

ratings.name: Jiří Luňák
ratings.review: Han je můj nadřízený. Je spolehlivý a umí vést meetingy, poradit s výukou a pomoci. Han je hodně aktivní člověk. Má spoustu koníčků a zajímá se o nové technologie. Je hodně informovaný o svém oboru a sleduje aktuality.

ratings.name: Magdalena Šrámková
ratings.review:
Velmi mě baví tento projekt, kde spolupracuji jako rodilý mluvčí v českém jazyce a konverzuji s vietnamskými studenty. Je to vzájemné propojení mezi dvěma kulturami, kde s navzájem poznáváme, učíme a obohacujeme svými úhly pohledu na život.

Han je velmi přátelský, cílevědomý, inteligentní a citlivý mladý muž, který se rád zdokonaluje ve svých talentech, stojí si za svými názory a je otevřený i dalším úhlům pohledu. Dokáže se pohybovat za svou hranicí komfortní zóny, nebojí se komunikovat i o tématech, která nejsou často společností přijímána, a to vše dělá s elegancí sobě vlastní. Je skvělý společník, má skvělé organizační schopnosti, nikdy se s ním nenudíte a vždy Vás překvapí něčím milým Záleží mu na tom, aby lidé kolem něj byli spokojení, bavili se a udržuje všechny v komunikaci.

ratings.name: Anna Do
ratings.review: Thai Ha Bui là người thông minh, vui vẻ và hòa đồng. Đặc biệt là người nhiều năng lượng, khi hợp tác với anh ấy bạn ko bao giờ có cảm giác bị bỏ rơi hay tụt lại phía sau. Năng lượng của anh ấy lúc nào cũng có thể tràn sang cho bạn, giúp bạn đi lên. Khá tỉ mỉ  trong công việc, nói chung hợp tác với anh ấy thì cả bạn và anh ấy đều chạm đến sự thành công. Nhưng lưu ý: khi bạn ốm hay đau đầu thì không nên lại gần anh ấy, sẽ làm cho bệnh của bạn càng trở lên trầm trọng hơn.

ratings.name: Mikuláš Vanoušek
ratings.review: Han works smart and hard. He can be late, but as soon as he comes, he gets the job done.
